title: On the Trail of Sasquatch
summary: Sasquatch is the clear culprit behind a trail of wide, deep footsteps marking a path in the remote wilds of southeast Alaska. The post On the Trail of Sasquatch appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Nominate Your 2022 Conservation Hero!
summary: After an unprecedented year, we are excited to recognize another incredible cohort of conservation heroes. Do you know an individual or organization that deserves recognition?
